text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if galvanized to action by Silence Suzuka's
otherworldly speed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Younger runners have also been pulling far ahead
in this new age of speed-first racing.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Suzuka! Here I cooooome!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yesss! Mom! Mama! I hope you were watching!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week, the roommate of Silence Suzuka, is
one of them. She dominated the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We arrive at the Takarazuka Kinen. For various
reasons, Mejiro Bright and I decided it would be
best not to run in it, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You can do it, Dober! Keep up the pace! Suzuka
may be in front, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh... her speed... it's not dropping at all...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Just keep going!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka has pulled far, far away! What
incredible speed! No one can even come close!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's really from another world! Whether it's a G1
or a G2 makes no difference! Look at her go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka's victory is absolute.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is unable to catch up, and Mejiro
Bright is momentarily at a loss for words, having
witnessed Silence Suzuka's speed, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Suzuka. You were spectacular
out there.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Bright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Have I seen anyone run like that ever before?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe I have... That was something I... it
was something no Mejiro is capable of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So that was the real you, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It was, Bright... And it was thanks to you that I'm
able to run like this, like myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huh? M-me?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Back at the Derby, you ran in a way only you
could.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's when I decided I wanted to run in a way only I can.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The Suzuka who raced against you then was not
me. But today... I am my real self.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
However, I'm still not perfect. I still can't reach
that scenery...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But, at the autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I see... Then that means I shall also have to polish
myself to a brighter sheen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Just like how the scenery you seek remains out of
reach...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The Mejiro's ideal still lies beyond me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, Suzuka, would you do me the honor
of racing against me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Before, I may have inspired you. But today, you
were the one who taught me something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm not done yet. I can still run in a way that is
more fitting to the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So... at the autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It's a promise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both inspired by the other, and awakened to their
potential, they promise to meet again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho. I feel like something
special will happen after what I've seen here
today. To be at our best, we'll have to train like
never before.
